\subheader{SUMMARY}{Self-directed Game Data Analyst with 10+ years driving data strategy across the games industry primarily as a sole contributor. A trusted cross-functional partner to product, design, engineering, and marketing — consistently delivering analysis that influences how teams build, balance, and grow games. Proven ability to communicate insights at every level of complexity, from executive-ready summaries to advanced data science models, turning player behaviour and business data into decisions that matter.
}

\section{Kano Apps - Casual Games \hfill
  \includegraphics[height=1em]{icons/logos/kano_logo.png}}
%{\vspace{-0.2cm}}


\begin{entrylist}
\entry
  {2025-05 -- \\ 2026-02}
  {Senior Game Data Engineer \& BI Analyst}
  {Victoria, BC Canada}
  {Hired to modernize the studio’s analytics stack by migrating reporting and transformation workflows from an undocumented, monolithic, spaghetti code R-based platform to a more scalable Python based platform.
 \textbf{Responsibilities \& Achievements}:
  \begin{itemize}

    \item Reworked, enhanced and migrated numerous RShiny reports to Quicksight.%, and stakeholder insights.
    \item Selectively applied LLM-assisted code translation to speed up migration. 
    \item Manually refactored R scripts too large and unstructured for AI tooling into optimized Python DBT-Athena SQL models on partitioned Parquet \& Iceberg tables.
    \begin{itemize}
    	\item Preserved seamless service delivery and data continuity across migration.
    	\item Improved monthly cost savings (23\%) and report turnaround time (13x).
    \end{itemize}

  \end{itemize}}
\end{entrylist}

  {Feb 2022 - Jan 2025}

 \textbf{Responsibilities \& Achievements}:
  \begin{itemize}

    %\item Independently migrated both Kixeye and Babil Games studios' Looker dashboards onto Stillfront's shared instance, reducing studio costs by \$90K annually while improving reporting continuity.
    \item Managed team's delivery of analytics reporting and tooling for two new games.  


    \item Developed a long-term revenue forecasting model in R and Python used in acquisition assessment, helping identify and correct a \$14M overestimation in a game acquisition deal.


    \item Revisited and eliminated PvP-matchmaking induced churn via a rather simple, yet novel approach while collaborating with Design, Product and Engineering.

	\item Partnered with Stillfront's DS team to improve LTV forecasting resulting in more realistic month-over-month targets.  

    \item Partnered with other Stillfront studios to define core KPIs,  reporting, deliver deep-dive analysis, and to foster trust for  cross-game-promotion initiatives.


  \end{itemize}}
\end{entrylist}

%{\vspace{-0.5cm}}

\begin{entrylist}
\entry
  {Jan 2021 - Feb 2022}
  {Senior Product Analyst, Acting Core Analytics Team Lead}
  {Victoria, BC Canada}
  {Promoted to help establish a small analytics team and improve collaboration across product, design, and engineering. Supported multiple game teams while building better analytical workflows and decision support.
 \textbf{Responsibilities \& Achievements}:
  \begin{itemize}

    %\item Automated KPI forecasting and A/B test reporting ETLs for Product and Design teams across all titles, improving experimentation support and significantly freeing up analyst time.
    \item Helped Design team discover and remediate multiple churn triggers related to progression, gameplay balance, and economy shocks using bayesian logistic regressions when A/B tests were infeasible.  
    \item Collaborated with the Design team to build a new content cadence strategy backed by funnel analysis and spend trend modelling, resulting in more consistent monetization and reduced revenue volatility across content releases. 
    \item Used network analysis to also how alliances varied greatly in terms of uplifting member engagement leading to work with Customer Service team come up with solutions around tracking MVPs and Alliance Leadership
    \item Built an Alliance Recommendation Engine in Python, materially improving retention and increasing yearly revenue by 7\% in concert with other improvements.  
    \item Identified flaw in the game's ELO matchmaking system driving elevated churn among PvP centric player clusters. Worked with engineering on guardrails 


  \end{itemize}}
\end{entrylist}

  {Aug 2019 - Jan 2021}
